title: Change to Subscription
excerpt:
Hello, 
I signed up for Monday’s Basic Package only 3 -4 months ago. But Monday has now removed a free template for grant management, and I can no longer open a contact to add more data.  I have now been told I must pay …

posts.author: AmyRootandSprout (Amy Tarlow-Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I signed up for Monday’s Basic Package only 3 -4 months ago. But Monday has now removed a free template for grant management, and I can no longer open a contact to add more data. I have now been told I must pay for and upgrade my subscription for these basic features. I connected with the Chat, and the Rep seemed to drop or ghost me. This is very disappointing. Considering the state of the NP world and grant writing, this is a pretty clumsy thing to do. I expect a company would honor the year-long subscription I paid upfront for. I wonder how much the top executives are making this year? Too bad, it seemed like a great platform.

posts.author: adriennemccue (Adrienne McCue)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you have 1000 contact fields? I think that’s the free version, did you apply for the nonprofit grant?

posts.author: KSegWin (Kevin Seguin [Monday Ambassador])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Amy!

I understand your frustration. Getting ghosted is no fun.

One thing I did want to recommend though, is Monday’s nonprofit pricing that could make upgrading a lot more affordable. It’s something that our organization uses and loves. If you haven’t already, I’d really encourage you to fill out the eligibility questionnaire.

All the best as you continue your grant work!

posts.author: AmyRootandSprout (Amy Tarlow-Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kevin,
Thank you for the note. I am a Grant Writing Consultant in Agriculture and Food Security, supporting for-profit and nonprofit organizations. Unfortunately, I will not be eligible for the NP discount. However, with a little elbow grease, I can build what I need in Microsoft or Google Workspace. Again, thank you for the note. - Amy
